<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/icon-192.png" />

/manifest.json.data:
{
  "name": "Backhand Intelligence",
  "short_name": "BH-Intell",
  "description": "AI-Powered Tennis Scouting Platform",
  "start_url": "/",
  "display": "standalone",
  "theme_color": "#0f1115",
  "background_color": "#0f1115",
  "orientation": "portrait-primary",
  "icons": [
    {
      "src": "/icon-192.png",
      "sizes": "192x192",
      "type": "image/png",
      "purpose": "any maskable"
    },
    {
      "src": "/icon-512.png",
      "sizes": "512x512",
      "type": "image/png",
      "purpose": "any maskable"
    }
  ]
}
